name: 米开朗基罗·威兹尼
name_full: 米开朗基罗·威兹尼 Michelangelo Vizzini
introduction: Michelangelo Vizzini is an Italian actor and musician. He developed a strong passion for music from a very young age, studying singing and piano at the age of nine.In 2023, he officially debuted on the recording scene with the single "In due a lottare." Alongside his musical career, he embarked on an acting career, starting with his first projects: Tutti pazzi per amore 4 (2011), directed by Riccardo Milani, and the short film Bro (2023), directed by Federico Moccia.In 2026, he will star in the international Amazon Prime film Love Me, Love Me, directed by Roger Kumble and produced by Amazon/MGM, playing the role of Blaze, and will also have a leading role in the Amazon Prime Creatives series.
